scripts.dev:ports-free: bash -c 'for p in 7000 7001; do pid=$(lsof -ti :$p 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pid" ] && kill -9 $pid; done; echo Ports 7000 and 7001 freed'
scripts.test:local: npx prisma generate --schema=database/schema.prisma && npm run build -w backend && npm run test -w backend && npm run build -w web
scripts.db:seed: npx prisma generate --schema=database/schema.prisma && node scripts/run-ts.cjs database/seed.ts
scripts.db:migrate: npx prisma generate --schema=database/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=database/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed:content: npx prisma generate --schema=database/schema.prisma && node scripts/run-ts.cjs database/seed-world-class-content.ts
scripts.db:seed-variations: npx prisma generate --schema=database/schema.prisma && node scripts/run-ts.cjs database/seed-variations.ts
scripts.db:sync-catalog: npx prisma generate --schema=database/schema.prisma && node scripts/run-ts.cjs database/sync-catalog-from-production.ts
scripts.db:import-xlsx: npx prisma generate --schema=database/schema.prisma && node scripts/run-ts.cjs database/import-products-xlsx.ts
